segments.text: Awake, awake; put on thy strength, O Zion; put on thy beautiful garments, O Jerusalem, the holy city: for henceforth there shall no more come into thee the uncircumcised and the unclean.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

segments.text: Shake thyself from the dust; arise, and sit down, O Jerusalem: loose thyself from the bands of thy neck, O captive daughter of Zion.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

segments.text: Ye have sold yourselves for nought; and ye shall be redeemed without money.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: My people went down aforetime into Egypt to sojourn there; and the Assyrian oppressed them without cause.
segments.speaker: Lord GOD

segments.text: My people is taken away for nought? they that rule over them make them to howl; and my name continually every day is blasphemed.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: My people shall know my name: therefore they shall know in that day that I am he that doth speak: behold, it is I.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: How beautiful upon the mountains are the feet of him that bringeth good tidings, that publisheth peace; that bringeth good tidings of good, that publisheth salvation; that saith unto Zion, Thy God reigneth!
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

segments.text: Thy watchmen shall lift up the voice; with the voice together shall they sing: for they shall see eye to eye, when the LORD shall bring again Zion.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

segments.text: Break forth into joy, sing together, ye waste places of Jerusalem: for the LORD hath comforted his people, he hath redeemed Jerusalem.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

segments.text: The LORD hath made bare his holy arm in the eyes of all the nations; and all the ends of the earth shall see the salvation of our God.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

segments.text: Depart ye, depart ye, go ye out from thence, touch no unclean thing; go ye out of the midst of her; be ye clean, that bear the vessels of the LORD.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

segments.text: Ye shall not go out with haste, nor go by flight: for the LORD will go before you; and the God of Israel will be your rereward.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

footnotes: be your rereward: Heb. gather you up

segments.text: Behold, my servant shall deal prudently, he shall be exalted and extolled, and be very high.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah

segments.text: As many were astonied at thee; his visage was so marred more than any man, and his form more than the sons of men:
So shall he sprinkle many nations; the kings shall shut their mouths at him: for that which had not been told them shall they see; and that which they had not heard shall they consider.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah
